examples: When covered by your hand, this antenna suffers from attenuation.
The attenuation weak spot is the black strip in the lower left corner of the band.
Some (Apple included) have pointed out that all phones suffer some signal attenuation when held near the antenna.
Despite attenuation issues, 8.4 million iPhones were sold in the three month period.
Simultaneously, outstanding passive noise attenuation guarantees undisturbed listening whatever your environment.
